title: 8 Pack Multi-Purpose Bottle and Jar Opener Grip Pads - 5.5” Round Non-Slip Kitchen Gripper for Lids, Cans and Medicine Bottles - 2-in-1 Coaster and Opener - by Bigleef
description:
About this item
Multi-Purpose Non-Slip Gripper: Whether you’d like to open jars with ease or keep your cups from sliding across the table - these handy 5.5” non slip gripper pads are perfect for hands of every size and any age.
Weak Hands? Arthritis? Our grippers are designed to be the ideal home and kitchen tool to help the elderly or those with hand conditions open cans, jars and medicine bottles with less effort and discomfort.
Heat Resistant Cup Coaster: Place under mugs, bowls, plates, cups and more to keep your kitchen tidy and prevent unwanted slippage. Our gripper pads are also heat resistant and can be used as a trivet under pots.
Add Some Grip Around The House: Use under a floor rug, door mat, knife block or small appliance - anywhere you need some added traction! Garage, office, or on any table, desk, cupboard, shelf, or counter in your home.
At BigLeef we pride ourselves in providing quality products that help conquer life’s little problems.
reviews_5s: These work great under a bowl of soup to keep it from sliding on the plate and they also help you open jars. That’s what I use them for, but I’m sure they have many uses.Love this type of jar opener and I've been looking for them locally for a long time. Finally found them here. Only drawback is having to buy so many when I only needed 1-2 but I'll give them out to friends.If you have weak hands this product is the answer. They grip and do not slip. These are a life saver for me. I recommend them highlyGood quality. Works great. Nice price. I only need 1 or 2 so I gave the rest to family members.These are way more flexible than thicker rubber ones that won’t grip good! These form better to the lids & your hands. Grip way better!work greatLove these and 2 of each color. My old ones were falling apart. Delighted with the new ones.When you get older and you grip gets a little weaker, these are essential.Besides opening jars, we use them to stop mixing bowls from sliding on the counter. Sometimes as a coffee cup coaster. Still finding uses. The 8 pack is worth it.Had not been able to find any of these. Thanks - glad to find them.
